race.comment: TORONESS (8) found the line nicely last start to get up for second over 1200m at this track. Record at this circuit is strong and is right in this contest. POWER OF SUCCESS (4) scored at this course last time out with 0.8 lengths in reserve at the end of 1300m. Has the pace to be in a prominent position from the outset and will play a major role in the outcome. TREASURER (7) was in a different class last time out, settling well back before rounding up his rivals to score by 2.75 lengths over 1400m at Beaudesert. Solid top-three prospects. WARILLA GORILLA (1) has been in the market at his last couple of starts but hasn't made an impression, last start running fourth at this track. Looks one for the minors.
